name: moment
Luis' Comments:
they promised to patch critical security issues, there is no active proactive bug hunting, no refactoring for modern performance, and no architectural upgrades

they also say "In most cases, you should not choose Moment for new projects."
Philippe's notes:
moment for instance is finished, not unhealthy, https://momentjs.com/docs/#/-project-status/
and only under security maintainance high downloads, low activity, likely responsive team to fix security bugs, and maintained in a foundation... so IMHO not healthy, but concerning and better passed or replaced
